nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for subjective judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I like to collaborate with AI for tasks related to brainstorming

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.label_negative: AI leading to decline in personal writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I'll let it completely handle tasks like improving upon my written communications, or drafting a social media caption

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes I use AI at work to discuss through interpersonal challenges that I may have with a customer

nodes.label: AI as project organization tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to isolated tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It was very satisfying because it felt like an all-encompassing approach to the issue at hand

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI diminishing personal skills
nodes.grounding_span: I am a little worried that I may end up leaning too much on AI for things like content drafting, writing emails, etc. and then that my own quality of writing would decrease

nodes.label: Business growth and profitability
nodes.grounding_span: to help me brainstorm new inventory I could carry in my business

nodes.label: Effective communication and customer satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me to take a breath and think through something before I respond to a difficult customer

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: my own quality of writing would decrease

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: It was very satisfying because it felt like an all-encompassing approach to the issue at hand

nodes.label: Resistance to over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am a little worried that I may end up leaning too much on AI for things like content drafting, writing emails, etc.

nodes.label: Trust in AI for brainstorming but not for subjective product selection
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to do adequate research on those types of things

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I'd say a little bit of both. I'll let it completely handle tasks like improving upon my written communications, or drafting a social media caption. But then I like to collaborate with AI for tasks related to brainstorming

nodes.label: Reflective deliberation before action
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me to take a breath and think through something before I respond to a difficult customer
